calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Decedent'S Assets Held By Trust
Off Calendar Dec-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Ellen, Esq. for Petitioner Martin Segol, no other appearances.

Mr. Ellen addressed to the court that he had met with Mrs. Segol, the document was signed a few days just before she passed, and is just didn't have enough time to transfer the assets to the trustee, and the general assignment is needed to cover the situations such as these.
The Court stated that after reviewed of the trust and the pour-over will, perhaps under the circumstances the general assignment was used for such reason. The Court granted Petition to confirm decedent's assets held by trust, proposed order submitted and to be reviewed after the hearing, clerk will call Mr. Allen when is ready for pickup.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

payments.description: PETN AND OPP RE INTERNAL AFFAIRS OF 17200 TRUST
